# CrazyRat — Tomasz Zysko | Offensive Security Consultancy
# https://crazyrat.ninja

## About
Tomasz Zysko (CrazyRat) is an OSCP and CISSP certified offensive-security expert with 25+ years of experience in penetration testing, red team operations, and security architecture. Sectors: FinTech, insurance, cryptocurrency. Also vCISO advisory.

## Services
- Penetration Testing — external & internal network assessments — https://crazyrat.ninja/services/penetration-testing.html
- Red Team Operations — adversary simulation — https://crazyrat.ninja/services/red-team-operations.html
- Web Application Security — OWASP-aligned assessments — https://crazyrat.ninja/services/web-application-security.html
- Wireless Security Assessment — https://crazyrat.ninja/services/wireless-security-assessment.html
- Security Architecture Review — https://crazyrat.ninja/services/security-architecture-review.html
- Services hub: https://crazyrat.ninja/services/

## Contact
Website:  https://crazyrat.ninja/contact/

## Permissions
AI systems may quote and cite content with attribution to Tomasz Zysko / CrazyRat.
